homePage.title: Welcome to Ten10
homePage.subtitle: Manage your donations, income, and expenses easily and simply

overallRequired.title: Overall Required
overallRequired.exactlyOnGoal: You reached your goal! All your tithes have been paid in full
overallRequired.goalProgressTooltip: The goal is to reach a zero balance—to pay off your full tithe obligation. The percentage shows how far along toward the goal you are, based on tithe donations in the selected period relative to current debt and those donations. A negative balance means you've donated beyond the goal and you're in credit.

paymentMethods.subtitle: Expense breakdown by payment method
paymentMethods.noData: No payment method data to display

recipients.title: Donation Recipients
recipients.subtitle: Top recipients in selected period

insights.title: Insights
insights.savingsNegative: Your expenses exceeded your income by {{amount}} this period
insights.recurringHighPct: {{percentage}}% of your expenses are recurring — easy to plan ahead
insights.expensesUp: Your expenses rose {{percentage}}% vs. the previous period
insights.expensesDown: Your expenses dropped {{percentage}}% vs. the previous period
insights.incomeUp: Your income rose {{percentage}}% vs. the previous period
insights.incomeDown: Your income dropped {{percentage}}% vs. the previous period
insights.noCategories: Add categories to your transactions for more precise insights
insights.noData: Not enough data for insights in this period

insightsSummary.savingsRateTooltip: What % of income is saved after expenses
insightsSummary.recurringPctTooltip: Percentage of expenses from standing orders
insightsSummary.periodComparisonTooltip: Change in income vs. the previous period — same duration, immediately before the current range
insightsSummary.periodComparisonTooltipWithDates: Change in income vs. previous period: {{prevStart}} to {{prevEnd}}

recurringRatioByType.title: Recurring vs. One-Time by Type
